Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61557, Lot 25277 — Ancients
Justinian II, First Reign (AD 685-695). AV tremissis (15mm, 1.45 gm, 7h). NGC AU 4/5 - 2/5, wrinkled, marks. Constantinople, AD 692-695. IhS CRIStDS RЄX-RЄϚNANtIЧM, half-length bust of Christ
sales.description:
Ancients
Justinian II, First Reign (AD 685-695). AV tremissis (15mm, 1.45 gm, 7h). NGC AU 4/5 - 2/5, wrinkled, marks. Constantinople, AD 692-695. IhS CRIStDS RЄX-RЄϚNANtIЧM, half-length bust of Christ facing, with long hair and full beard, wearing pallium and colobium, cross behind head, right hand raised in benediction, book of Gospels cradled in left / D IЧStINI-AN-ЧS SERЧ CHRIStI, full-length figure of Justinian II standing facing, wearing loros and crown surmounted by cross, long cross pot...
